arts.ttl: Wrexham add Rodriguez; sign Smith for record fee
arts.sum: Wrexham have announced the signings of former England striker Jay Rodríguez and Reading forward Sam Smith, with sources telling ESPN that the deal for Smith is a club-record fee.

arts.ttl: Jay Rodriguez opens up on 'tough decision' to leave Burnley after sealing Wrexham move
arts.sum: Jay Rodriguez has paid tribute to his boyhood club after deciding to leave Burnley to link up with ambitious League One outfit Wrexham.

arts.ttl: Burnley's Jay Rodriguez linked with January move to big-spending League One outfit
arts.sum: Jay Rodriguez’s Burnley love affair could be about to end – with reports suggesting he’s closing in on a move to ambitious League One outfit Wrexham.

arts.ttl: The Home Office's GBE rules that are stopping Portsmouth from signing Sunderland winger Adil Aouchiche
arts.sum: Pompey’s efforts to bring in Sunderland winger Adil Aouchiche as their fifth signing of the January transfer window hang in the balance.

arts.ttl: Sunderland boss gives green light for Portsmouth target exit - as Fratton move hits buffers
arts.sum: Regis Le Bris has given clearance for Pompey target Adil Aouchiche to leave Sunderland.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Burnley: Two changes in predicted line-up against promotion chasers
arts.sum: Pompey aim to return to winning ways as promotion chasers Burnley arrive at Fratton Park

arts.ttl: Zian Flemming discusses Burnley’s promotion aims, Scott Parker, goal target and Portsmouth test
arts.sum: Any method will do in Burnley’s quest to return to the Premier League according to their top goalscorer Zian Flemming.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth, West Ham and Ipswich-linked striker to be offered new deal amid transfer speculation
arts.sum: Pompey’s supposed interest in Celtic youngster Daniel Cummings looks set to be scuppered.

arts.ttl: Sunderland winger’s move to Portsmouth on the verge of collapse, report claims
arts.sum: Sunderland winger Adil Aouchiche’s proposed move to Portsmouth is on the rocks due to home office rules, according… The post Sunderland winger’s move to Portsmouth on the verge of collapse, report claims appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Burnley injury update ahead of Portsmouth test as Aaron Ramsey 'edges closer' to return
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsey is edging ever closer to making his long-awaited return from injury for Burnley.
